title: ‘She is very angry with me’: My daughter, 30, has issues with drugs. Should I take half the profit from the sale of her house?
summary: A parent seeks advice on using half the profits from their adult daughter's house sale as an inheritance investment. The daughter, age 30, is struggling with drug addiction. The parent hopes to invest the funds for her future recovery.
content: “My thought is to invest it on her behalf for someday, when she gets her life together.”

zh.title: "她对我非常生气"：我30岁的女儿有毒品问题。我应该拿走她房子出售利润的一半吗？
zh.summary: 一位父母寻求建议，是否应该将成年女儿房屋出售利润的一半用作遗产投资。30岁的女儿正在与毒品成瘾作斗争。父母希望投资这些资金以支持她未来的恢复。

title: Stock futures are little changed as Wall Street awaits another April inflation report: Live updates
summary: Stock futures showed little movement as investors awaited the April producer price index report on Wednesday. This inflation data could influence market direction heading into mid-week trading. The PPI is a key indicator of inflation pressures in the economy.
content: April's producer price index, another key inflation report, will be released at 8:30 a.m. on Wednesday morning.

zh.title: 股市期货保持平稳，华尔街等待4月通胀报告：实时更新
zh.summary: 当投资者等待周三的4月生产者价格指数报告时，股市期货表现平静。这份通胀数据可能会影响市场在本周中期交易的走向。生产者价格指数是经济通胀压力的关键指标。

title: The real cost of the Iran war isn’t just higher prices — it’s market paralysis
summary: The Iran conflict's impact on markets extends beyond rising prices to create market paralysis and investment uncertainty. When investors face unpredictable geopolitical outcomes, confidence erodes even without immediate price shocks. This uncertainty poses a greater risk to economic growth than price increases alone.
content: Markets can handle rising prices. What crushes confidence is uncertainty that squelches investment.

zh.title: 伊朗战争的真实代价不仅仅是价格上升——而是市场瘫痪
zh.summary: 伊朗冲突对市场的影响超越价格上升，造成市场瘫痪和投资不确定性。当投资者面临不可预测的地缘政治结果时，即使没有立即价格冲击，信心也会侵蚀。这种不确定性对经济增长的风险大于仅仅价格上升。

title: Wednesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
summary: The S&P 500 retreated from record levels as rising oil prices and stronger-than-expected consumer inflation data pressured stocks. Investors are grappling with competing concerns about economic strength and inflation. Wednesday's trading session will be closely watched for further direction.
content: The S&P 500 pulled back from its record on Tuesday as higher oil prices and a hot consumer inflation report kept stocks under pressure.

zh.title: 周三股市大事件：下一个交易时段可能推动市场的因素
zh.summary: 标普500指数从纪录高位回落，因油价上升和强于预期的消费者通胀数据而承压。投资者正在应对经济强劲和通胀之间相互矛盾的担忧。周三的交易时段将受到密切关注，以确定进一步的走向。

title: Here’s the silver lining for stocks and 5% Treasury yields
summary: While 5% Treasury yields increase borrowing costs for businesses and consumers, this rate is unlikely to persist long-term in the Treasury market. Higher yields present a silver lining for savers and conservative investors seeking better returns. The market typically adjusts yields based on economic conditions and Fed policy.
content: Higher rates mean higher costs for borrowers, but 5% isn’t a level that’s prone to sticking around in the Treasury market

zh.title: 股票和5%国债收益率的利好消息
zh.summary: 虽然5%的国债收益率增加了企业和消费者的借贷成本，但这一利率不太可能在国债市场中长期存在。更高的收益率为寻求更好回报的储户和保守型投资者提供了利好。市场通常根据经济条件和美联储政策调整收益率。

title: Air India crisis deepens ahead of final Ahmedabad crash report
summary: Air India faces deepening operational and financial challenges as it approaches the release of a final report on the Ahmedabad crash. The airline is experiencing a leadership vacuum amid mounting losses. The crash investigation and recovery efforts have added pressure on the already struggling carrier.
content: Air India faces a leadership vacuum and mounting financial losses as it struggles to recover from the crash.

zh.title: 印度航空危机在艾哈迈达巴德坠机最终报告发布前加深
zh.summary: 印度航空面临日益加深的运营和财务挑战,因为它即将发布艾哈迈达巴德坠机的最终报告。该航空公司在损失增加中经历领导层真空。坠机调查和恢复工作对已经陷入困境的航空公司增加了压力。

title: Is AI power really the new oil? Soon it will trade like just like a commodity.
summary: CME Group plans to launch futures contracts that would allow investors to speculate on computing power prices. The move signals a shift toward treating AI computing capacity as a tradeable commodity, similar to oil or metals. This development could reshape how companies hedge their AI infrastructure costs.
content: CME Group plans to launch futures that would let investors bet on the price of computing power.

zh.title: 人工智能算力真的是新石油吗?很快它将像商品一样交易。
zh.summary: 芝加哥商品交易所集团计划推出期货合约,允许投资者对计算力价格进行投机。此举标志着将人工智能计算能力视为可交易商品(类似于石油或金属)的转变。这一发展可能会改变公司对冲其人工智能基础设施成本的方式。

title: The stock market isn't ignoring Iran. It's rising for these three very real reasons
summary: U.S. stock markets are rallying despite ongoing tensions with Iran now in its third month of active conflict. The gains reflect fundamental economic strength and specific market drivers beyond geopolitical concerns. Analysts identify concrete reasons for the market's resilience during the conflict.
content: It's time to take a closer look with stocks rallying into the third month of the U.S.-Iran conflict.

zh.title: 股票市场并非无视伊朗。它上升是出于这三个非常真实的原因
zh.summary: 尽管与伊朗的紧张局势持续存在,现在已进入主动冲突的第三个月,但美国股票市场仍在反弹。这些涨幅反映了基本经济实力和超越地缘政治关切的具体市场驱动力。分析师们识别了市场在冲突期间保持韧性的具体原因。

title: Copper prices are now at their highest level on record. AI is only part of the story.
summary: Copper prices have reached record highs, driven by both AI-related demand increases and supply chain disruptions including bottlenecks at the Strait of Hormuz. While AI adoption contributes to copper demand, geopolitical factors are equally significant. The dual pressures suggest sustained price elevation in the near term.
content: Copper refining now has a Strait of Hormuz problem.

zh.title: 铜价创历史新高。人工智能只是故事的一部分。
zh.summary: 铜价已达历史高位，受人工智能相关需求增加和包括霍尔木兹海峡瓶颈在内的供应链中断的推动。虽然人工智能采用有助于铜需求，但地缘政治因素同样重要。这双重压力表明短期内铜价将保持高位。

title: Trump wants gas tax relief. But slim driver savings could strain a key federal fund
summary: President Trump is proposing a federal gas tax suspension to provide drivers relief at the pump. However, the actual savings for consumers would be minimal, potentially only cents per gallon. The suspension would create a funding shortfall for critical highway maintenance and infrastructure projects.
content: President Donald Trump floated a federal gas tax suspension. If enacted, here's how that could impact consumers.

zh.title: 特朗普欲减轻汽油税。但驾驶者的微薄节省可能会拖累关键联邦基金
zh.summary: 特朗普总统提议暂停联邦汽油税以为驾驶者提供油价救济。然而，消费者的实际节省将是微乎其微的，每加仑可能只节省几美分。暂停将为关键的公路维护和基础设施项目造成资金短缺。

title: Waymo recalls 3,800 robotaxis after glitch allowed some vehicles to 'drive into standing water'
summary: Waymo issued a voluntary recall of approximately 3,800 robotaxis to address a software glitch that could allow vehicles to enter flooded roadways. The safety issue was identified during testing and the company is deploying a fix. This represents proactive safety management for the autonomous vehicle fleet.
content: Waymo issued a voluntary recall of about 3,800 of its robotaxis to fix software issues that could allow them to drive into flooded roadways.

zh.title: Waymo召回3,800辆机器人出租车，因故障导致部分车辆"驶入积水"
zh.summary: Waymo主动召回约3,800辆机器人出租车，以解决可能导致车辆驶入积水路面的软件故障。该安全问题在测试期间被发现，公司正在部署修复程序。这代表了对自主驾驶车队的主动安全管理。

title: What former poker champion turned investing coach Annie Duke says most of us get wrong about risk
summary: Former poker champion and investing coach Annie Duke discusses common misconceptions about risk management and decision-making in investing. Duke addresses how investors make costly mistakes during market bubbles and why psychological factors cause poor timing decisions. Her insights draw parallels between poker strategy and investment strategy.
content: The author of ‘Quit’ talks about market bubbles, costly investing mistakes and why investors freeze at the worst time.

zh.title: 前扑克冠军转型投资教练安妮·杜克谈我们对风险的常见误解
zh.summary: 前扑克冠军兼投资教练安妮·杜克讨论了关于风险管理和投资决策的常见误解。杜克阐述了投资者在市场泡沫期间如何犯代价高昂的错误，以及心理因素如何导致时机选择不当。她的见解在扑克策略和投资策略之间进行了类比。

title: Intel’s stock just guided the chip sector toward a sharp selloff. Here’s why.
summary: Intel's recent guidance triggered concerns across the semiconductor sector, causing a sharp selloff in chip stocks. Analysts cite buyer exhaustion from extended chip rallies and growing uncertainty about data-center spending commitments. The sector's weakness could signal broader softness in technology investment demand.
content: Analysts note “buyer exhaustion” and market concerns about what the latest inflation data may mean for future data-center spending commitments.

zh.title: 英特尔股价指引芯片行业走向大幅抛售。原因如下。
zh.summary: 英特尔最近的指引在半导体行业引发了担忧，导致芯片股票大幅抛售。分析师指出，持久的芯片涨势令买家疲惫不堪，数据中心支出承诺的不确定性也在增加。该行业的疲软可能预示着科技投资需求的更广泛疲软。

title: Clothes just saw the biggest price jump in three years. How much more will shoppers pay?
summary: Clothing prices surged by their largest margin in three years as manufacturers and retailers raised prices in response to Iran war impacts. Producers are anticipating prolonged effects from the conflict on supply chains and costs. Consumer apparel spending could face sustained pressure from these elevated prices.
content: Analysts said manufacturers and retailers raised prices in response to — and in further anticipation of — the effects of the Iran war.

zh.title: 服装价格创三年来最大涨幅。消费者还要多付多少钱？
zh.summary: 由于制造商和零售商因伊朗战争影响而提价，服装价格创下三年来最大涨幅。生产商预计冲突对供应链和成本的影响将持续。消费者服装支出可能面临这些更高价格带来的持续压力。

title: OpenAI trial updates: Altman says Musk's exit was a 'morale boost' for some employees
summary: Elon Musk is accusing OpenAI CEO Sam Altman and President Greg Brockman of attempting to 'steal a charity,' highlighting ongoing tensions from Musk's exit from the company. The accusation comes amid an active legal trial between Musk and OpenAI over the organization's direction and governance.
content: Elon Musk is accusing OpenAI CEO Sam Altman and President Greg Brockman of trying to 'steal a charity.'

zh.title: OpenAI诉讼最新进展：Altman表示Musk的离职对部分员工是"士气提振"
zh.summary: 埃隆·马斯克指控OpenAI首席执行官Sam Altman和总裁Greg Brockman试图"盗取慈善机构"，突显了马斯克离开公司带来的持续紧张局势。这一指控出现在马斯克与OpenAI之间的积极法律诉讼中，该诉讼涉及组织的方向和治理问题。

title: Trump says Makary is out as FDA commissioner, following industry and White House backlash
summary: President Trump announced the removal of FDA Commissioner Makary following significant backlash from pharmaceutical companies and physicians over regulatory decisions. Makary's tenure was marked by internal FDA dysfunction and leadership turmoil that prompted calls for his departure.
content: Makary's tenure was marked by internal dysfunction at the FDA, leadership turmoil and mounting backlash from drugmakers and physicians on regulatory decisions.

zh.title: 特朗普表示Makary不再担任FDA专员，原因是行业和白宫的反对
zh.summary: 特朗普总统宣布撤销FDA专员Makary，原因是制药公司和医生对其监管决策的强烈反对。Makary的任期以FDA内部功能失调和领导层混乱为特征，这促使人们要求其下台。

title: Senate confirms Kevin Warsh as Fed governor, clears way for chair vote
summary: The Senate confirmed Kevin Warsh as Federal Reserve governor in a 51-45 party-line vote, clearing the way for his potential nomination as Fed chair. The confirmation represents a significant shift in Federal Reserve leadership.
content: The upper chamber voted to approve Warsh's nomination by a 51-45 vote, on a mostly party-line basis.

zh.title: 参议院确认Kevin Warsh为美联储董事，为主席投票扫清障碍
zh.summary: 参议院以51-45的党派分歧投票确认Kevin Warsh为美联储董事，为他可能被提名为美联储主席扫清了障碍。这一确认代表了美联储领导层的重大转变。

title: AI is ‘absolutely useless’ at forecasting inflation. This proven model is 12 times more accurate.
summary: A traditional forecasting model from the Cleveland Federal Reserve outperforms generative AI by a factor of 12 in predicting inflation, exposing AI's limitations for economic forecasting. The study demonstrates that simpler, proven methods remain more reliable than cutting-edge language models for this critical task.
content: A “low-tech” tool from the Cleveland Fed consistently outperforms generative AI, which has struggled to provide reliable forecasts.

zh.title: 人工智能在通胀预测中"绝对无用"。这个经过验证的模型准确度高12倍。
zh.summary: 克利夫兰联邦储备银行的传统预测模型在预测通胀方面的表现比生成式人工智能高出12倍，暴露了人工智能在经济预测中的局限性。这项研究证明，对于这项关键任务，更简单、经过验证的方法比尖端语言模型更可靠。

title: The first wave of tariff refunds have begun flowing in
summary: Following the Supreme Court's ruling that some Trump administration tariffs were unconstitutional, the first wave of refunds has begun processing for affected businesses and consumers. The ruling and refund process represent a significant legal and financial setback for the administration's trade policies.
content: After the Supreme Court ruled some of President Trump's tariffs unconstitutional, the first wave of tariff refunds have begun flowing in.

zh.title: 第一批关税退款已开始流向市场
zh.summary: 继最高法院裁定特朗普政府的某些关税违宪后，第一批退款已开始向受影响的企业和消费者处理。该裁决和退款流程代表了政府贸易政策的重大法律和财务挫折。

title: Analysis: Iran war hangs over Trump's China trip — and his presidency
summary: The ongoing Iran war is creating substantial economic and geopolitical complications as President Trump prepares for diplomatic engagement with China. The conflict has produced long-term economic damage with no apparent near-term resolution.
content: There is no quick fix to the economic and political damage from the war.

zh.title: 分析：伊朗战争笼罩特朗普的中国之行——以及他的总统任期
zh.summary: 随着特朗普总统为与中国的外交接触做准备，持续的伊朗战争正在造成巨大的经济和地缘政治复杂性。这场冲突已造成长期经济损害，且没有明显的近期解决方案。

title: Trump doesn't need Congress to restart Iran strikes: Hegseth
summary: Defense Secretary Hegseth stated that the Trump administration can resume military strikes against Iran without Congressional authorization as the conflict approaches its fourth month. The Iran war has already driven oil prices higher globally through disruptions to the Strait of Hormuz.
content: The Iran war, now well into its third month, has caused oil prices to soar globally as Iran continues to lock down the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 特朗普重启对伊朗军事打击无需国会授权：赫格塞思
zh.summary: 国防部长赫格塞思表示，特朗普政府可以在没有国会授权的情况下重启对伊朗的军事打击，而这场冲突即将进入第四个月。伊朗战争已通过霍尔木兹海峡的中断导致全球油价上升。

title: The summer box office is off to a hot start as weekend ticket sales top $160 million
summary: The summer box office is performing strongly with weekend ticket sales exceeding $160 million, driven by consistent performance from multiple films. The robust early performance suggests a healthy theatrical season ahead.
content: The summer box office is off to a sizzling start, thanks in part to strong week-after-week performance from returning titles.

zh.title: 暑期票房开局火爆，周末票房突破1.6亿美元
zh.summary: 暑期电影票房表现强劲，周末票房超过1.6亿美元，由多部影片的一致表现驱动。这种强劲的早期表现预示着未来的剧院季节将很健康。

title: Social Security COLA for 2027 may be higher as inflation rises, new estimates find
summary: Social Security's cost-of-living adjustment for 2027 may be higher than previously estimated as inflation continues to rise, according to new expert forecasts. A larger COLA would increase benefit payments for retirees starting in 2027.
content: As the pace of inflation increases, that may lead to a higher Social Security cost-of-living adjustment for 2027, according to new expert estimates.

zh.title: 社会保障2027年生活成本调整可能更高，新估计显示通胀上升
zh.summary: 根据新的专家预测，社会保障2027年生活成本调整可能高于之前估计，因为通胀继续上升。更大的生活成本调整将从2027年开始增加退休人士的福利支付。

title: As airfares soar 21%, these are the cheapest cities to fly into
summary: Airfares have surged 21% as airlines respond to elevated jet fuel costs by raising ticket prices, cutting routes, and increasing baggage fees. The article identifies cheaper airport alternatives for cost-conscious travelers navigating the high-fare environment.
content: Some airlines have raised fares, cut routes and hiked bag fees in response to increasing jet-fuel prices.

zh.title: 随着机票价格飙升21%，这些是最便宜的航班城市
zh.summary: 机票价格上涨21%，航空公司因应喷气燃料成本上升而提高票价、削减航线并增加行李费。该文章为在高票价环境中航行的成本意识旅客确定了更便宜的机场替代方案。

title: Korean stocks are coming off their best week since 2008. Where the charts signal they're heading next
summary: Korean stocks just completed their strongest week since 2008, prompting analysis of where the market could be headed next. Market technician Todd Gordon examines the high-flying Korean stock market's chart patterns to forecast future direction.
content: Todd Gordon breaks down the charts on the high-flying Korean stock market.

zh.title: 韩国股票创下2008年以来最好的一周。图表显示它们接下来将去往何处
zh.summary: 韩国股票刚刚完成了自2008年以来最强劲的一周，促使人们分析市场接下来可能的方向。市场技术分析师托德·戈登审视了高飞的韩国股市图表模式，以预测未来方向。

title: Laid off GM employees describe ominous meeting, AI and severance
summary: General Motors laid off employees on Monday, with affected workers describing termination meetings that highlighted the role of AI in the severance decisions. The layoffs reflect ongoing restructuring in the automotive industry.
content: Several General Motors employees who were laid off Monday described their jobs being terminated to CNBC.

zh.title: 被裁员的通用汽车员工描述不祥的会议、人工智能和遣散费
zh.summary: 通用汽车周一裁员，受影响的员工描述了强调人工智能在遣散费决策中的作用的终止会议。裁员反映了汽车行业正在进行的重组。

title: Social Security’s COLA could rise as much as 4.2% in 2027, boosted by Iran war impact and inflation
summary: Social Security's cost-of-living adjustment for 2027 could reach as much as 4.2%, driven by surging energy and food prices amplified by the Iran war. This would represent one of the largest COLA increases in years, significantly boosting retiree benefits.
content: Surging gasoline and energy prices, as well as the cost of groceries, have pushed the forecast for the cost-of-living adjustment higher.

zh.title: 2027年社会保障生活成本调整可能增至4.2%，受伊朗战争影响和通胀推动
zh.summary: 2027年社会保障生活成本调整可能达到4.2%，由能源和食品价格大幅上涨推动，伊朗战争扩大了这一影响。这将代表多年来最大的生活成本调整增幅之一，显著提高退休人员的福利。

title: Why the oil crisis could become a full-blown catastrophe within a month
summary: Global crude oil reserves are being depleted rapidly, creating the risk of a severe supply crisis within a month. The potential energy scarcity could have catastrophic economic consequences worldwide.
content: Global crude reserves are rapidly depleting, pushing the world toward scarcity.

zh.title: 为什么石油危机可能在一个月内演变成全面灾难
zh.summary: 全球原油储备正在迅速耗尽，造成一个月内出现严重供应危机的风险。潜在的能源短缺可能对全球造成灾难性的经济后果。

title: The market rally takes a breather. Here are 3 reasons why — and 1 silver lining
summary: The stock market rally has paused with analysis identifying three primary factors driving the pullback and one positive counterbalance. The Investing Club's Homestretch provides daily actionable market insights for traders making end-of-day decisions.
content: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

zh.title: 股市涨势暂停。以下是3个原因——以及1线希望
zh.summary: 股市涨势暂停，分析确定了推动回调的三个主要因素和一个积极抵消因素。投资俱乐部的"最后冲刺"为进行交易日终决策的交易者提供每日可行的市场洞察。

title: Consumer prices rose 3.8% annually in April, the highest since May 2023
summary: Consumer prices increased 3.8% annually in April, exceeding the expected 3.7% and reaching the highest level since May 2023. The increase signals persistent inflation pressures in the economy.
content: The consumer price index was expected to increase by 3.7% annually in April, according to the Dow Jones consensus.

zh.title: 四月消费者价格年涨3.8%，创2023年5月以来新高
zh.summary: 四月消费者价格年涨3.8%，超过预期的3.7%，创2023年5月以来最高水平。这一增长表明经济中存在持久的通胀压力。

title: UK borrowing costs hit highest for 18 years as uncertainty over PM continues
summary: UK borrowing costs have reached their highest level in 18 years amid uncertainty about the Prime Minister's future. The possibility of a change in leadership has unsettled investors and driven bond yields higher.
content: The possibility of a change of leadership in the UK has unsettled some investors and sent bond yields higher.

zh.title: 英国借贷成本创18年新高，总理前景不确定
zh.summary: 在总理前景不确定的背景下，英国借贷成本已达18年来的最高水平。领导层可能发生变化已经动摇了投资者信心，推高了债券收益率。

title: US inflation hits three-year high of 3.8%, driven up by surging energy costs
summary: US inflation reached a three-year high of 3.8% in April, driven primarily by surging energy costs amid geopolitical tensions. The measure reflects the economic impact of the Iran conflict on consumer prices.
content: The key measure of US inflation rose in April to its highest level since May 2023 as consumers feel the impact of the Iran war.

zh.title: 美国通胀创三年新高3.8%，地缘政治紧张推高能源成本
zh.summary: 美国通胀在四月创三年新高3.8%，主要由于地缘政治紧张局势下能源成本飙升。这一数据反映了伊朗冲突对消费者价格的经济影响。

title: This dot-com survivor says AI build-out is more like 1997 than 1999 — and still urges investors to hold more cash
summary: A veteran of the dot-com era argues the current AI build-out resembles 1997 rather than the crash-prone environment of 1999, suggesting further growth ahead. Despite drawing comparisons to pre-crash speculation, the analyst recommends investors maintain elevated cash positions.
content: The riveting gains for microchip stocks have many analysts drawing parallels to 1999, just ahead of the dot-com crash, when the build-out of a key technology led to parabolic moves and frenzied speculation.

zh.title: 互联网泡沫幸存者：AI建设更像1997年，投资者应持有更多现金
zh.summary: 一位互联网泡沫时代的资深人士辩称，当前的AI建设更像1997年而非容易崩溃的1999年环境，暗示增长仍有空间。尽管与崩盘前的投机相比较，该分析师建议投资者维持较高的现金头寸。

title: EBay rejects GameStop's $56 billion takeover bid, calling it 'neither credible nor attractive'
summary: eBay has rejected GameStop's $56 billion takeover bid, calling it neither credible nor attractive. Analysts questioned GameStop's ability to finance the deal and the strategic rationale behind it.
content: Many analysts questioned the deal, citing questions about how GameStop would finance the transaction and the strategic rationale.

zh.title: eBay拒绝GameStop的560亿美元收购要约，称其"既不可信也不具吸引力"
zh.summary: eBay拒绝了GameStop的560亿美元收购要约，称其既不可信也不具吸引力。分析师质疑GameStop融资该交易的能力和其战略理由。

title: Here are Tuesday's biggest analyst calls of the day: Nvidia, Broadcom, Tesla, Lowe's, Disney, Intel & more
summary: Wall Street analysts issued significant calls on major stocks including Nvidia, Broadcom, Tesla, and Intel. The trading day featured multiple analyst upgrades and downgrades on key market players.
content: Here are the biggest calls on Wall Street on Tuesday.

zh.title: 周二重磅分析师评级：英伟达、博通、特斯拉、劳氏、迪士尼、英特尔等
zh.summary: 华尔街分析师对包括英伟达、博通、特斯拉和英特尔在内的主要股票发表了重要评论。交易日出现了多个关键市场参与者的分析师上调和下调。

title: Inflation jumps to 3-year high, CPI shows, and that’s not the end of it
summary: US inflation surged to a three-year high of 3.8% in April, primarily driven by elevated gas prices. Economists warn that inflationary pressures are likely to persist, continuing to squeeze consumer finances.
content: The U.S. inflation rate leaped to a nearly three-year high of 3.8% in April because of higher gas prices — and the pain for consumers isn’t going away soon.

zh.title: 通货膨胀跳升至3年高位，CPI数据显示，这还不是终点
zh.summary: 美国4月通货膨胀率飙升至3年高位3.8%，主要由汽油价格高企推动。经济学家警告称，通胀压力可能会持续，继续挤压消费者的财务状况。

title: Amazon accelerates delivery race with 30-minute drop-offs in dozens of U.S. cities
summary: Amazon is accelerating its delivery competition by introducing 30-minute drop-off options across dozens of U.S. cities. The move extends the company's ongoing push to compress delivery times beyond existing two-day and next-day offerings.
content: Amazon has been gradually speeding up its delivery windows, after getting customers hooked on two-day and next-day shipping.

zh.title: 亚马逊加速配送竞争，在美国数十个城市推出30分钟自提服务
zh.summary: 亚马逊通过在美国数十个城市推出30分钟自提选项来加速配送竞争。此举扩展了该公司持续推动的压缩配送时间的努力，超越现有的两天和次日配送选项。

title: I’m 68. Is it wise to invest my $500,000 retirement savings with a single investment firm?
summary: A financial advice column addresses whether concentrating $500,000 in retirement savings with a single investment firm is prudent for a 68-year-old. Relevant protections include Securities Investor Protection Corporation coverage limits of up to $500,000 for securities.
content: The Securities Investor Protection Corporation provides coverage of up to $500,000 for stocks, bonds and mutual funds, including up to $250,000 in cash.

zh.title: 我68岁了。将50万美元的退休储蓄投资给单一投资公司是否明智？
zh.summary: 一个财经建议专栏讨论了将50万美元的退休储蓄集中投资给单一投资公司对于68岁老人来说是否谨慎。相关保护包括证券投资者保护公司对证券的最高50万美元的保险范围。

title: Buy this drone stock as demand for unmanned aircrafts grows, Goldman Sachs says
summary: Goldman Sachs has initiated buy-rated coverage on a drone manufacturer, anticipating growth in unmanned aircraft demand. The investment bank's backing reflects confidence in the sector's expansion potential.
content: The bank initiated coverage of the drone name with a buy rating.

zh.title: 高盛看好无人机需求增长，建议买入相关股票
zh.summary: 高盛对一家无人机制造商启动了买入评级，预期无人机需求将增长。这家投资银行的支持反映了对该行业扩张潜力的信心。

title: UK MPs are turning on PM Starmer — Now analysts say he's unlikely to last the year
summary: UK Members of Parliament are increasingly critical of Prime Minister Starmer, with analysts revising expectations to suggest he may not survive the year. The political pressure signals growing internal party dissent.
content: Analysts have slashed the odds of Starmer facing a leadership challenge by September.

zh.title: 英国议员转向反对首相斯塔默——分析师称他不太可能度过今年
zh.summary: 英国议会成员越来越多地批评首相斯塔默，分析师修正预期，认为他可能无法度过今年。政治压力显示了党内不满情绪日益增长。

title: The ‘godfather of crypto’ predicts $1 million bitcoin, but it’s going to fall first
summary: Michael Terpin, a prominent crypto figure, predicts Bitcoin will eventually reach $1 million but expects a significant correction first based on his theory of four-year price cycles. Another bear market is anticipated before the next bull run.
content: Michael Terpin explained his theory of four-year cycles in the bitcoin price that bottom during midterm-election years. One more correction is coming before another bull market.

zh.title: "加密货币教父"预测比特币将达到100万美元，但首先会下跌
zh.summary: 著名加密货币人物迈克尔·特尔平预测比特币最终将达到100万美元，但基于他的四年价格周期理论，他预期首先会出现显著调整。在下一轮牛市之前，预计还会出现另一次熊市。

title: What's at stake for trade, Taiwan and Iran in Trump's high-risk summit with China's Xi
summary: A high-stakes summit between Trump and China's Xi Jinping could reshape geopolitics around trade, Taiwan, and Iran. China experts expect potential announcements including Chinese purchases of U.S. agricultural products or Boeing aircraft.
content: China experts anticipate Trump and Xi may announce trade deals or other agreements, such as a Chinese purchase of U.S. agricultural products or Boeing aircraft.

zh.title: 特朗普与习近平高风险峰会中的贸易、台湾和伊朗问题

title: Hims & Hers plummets 15% after first-quarter loss, weak earnings guidance
summary: Hims & Hers stock fell 15% following a first-quarter loss and disappointing earnings guidance. The company's financial challenges emerged despite a March partnership with Novo Nordisk to sell the GLP-1 weight loss drug Wegovy.
content: Hims & Hers reached a deal with Novo Nordisk in March to sell its GLP-1 weight loss drug Wegovy on its platform.

zh.title: Hims & Hers因首季亏损和弱指引下跌15%
zh.summary: Hims & Hers股票在首季度亏损和令人失望的盈利指引后下跌15%。尽管该公司在3月与Novo Nordisk达成合作销售GLP-1减肥药Wegovy，但仍面临财务困难。

title: AI super rally has retail investors acting the most aggressive since trading frenzy during Covid
summary: Retail investors are exhibiting aggressive trading behavior around artificial intelligence stocks unseen since the Covid-era trading boom. Options buying in major tech stocks has reached its heaviest 10-day pace since 2021.
content: Retail traders are buying calls in Cboe's "Mag 10" stocks – the big seven plus AMD, Palantir and Broadcom – at the heaviest 10-day clip since 2021, according to a report from the exchange.

zh.title: 人工智能超级反弹推动散户投资者行为最激进，自疫情以来最甚

title: CNBC Daily Open: Can Starmer ‘keep calm and carry on?'
summary: UK PM Keir Starmer confronts a growing party rebellion that threatens his leadership stability and ability to govern effectively.
content: U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer faces a crunch cabinet meeting this morning, after failing to quell a growing party rebellion.

zh.title: CNBC每日开盘：斯塔默能否"保持冷静，坚持下去"？

title: European stocks to open lower as hopes for U.S.-Iran peace deal fade
summary: European stock markets are expected to decline as U.S.-Iran peace negotiations stall, signaling prolonged geopolitical tensions ahead.
content: European stocks are expected to open in negative territory as prospects for a speedy resolution to the U.S.-Iran war appear increasingly remote.

summary: AI security emerges as a critical negotiating priority as Trump prepares for his first presidential visit to China, reflecting superpower competition over technological dominance.
content: The stakes for AI security have risen sharply in the runup to the first trip to China by a sitting U.S. president in nearly a decade.

title: Behind Big Oil’s first-quarter beat: The quiet rise of trading desks
summary: European oil majors reported stronger-than-expected first-quarter profits, with trading operations emerging as a significant driver of financial performance.
content: Europe's oil supermajors highlighted trading contributions as they reported stronger-than-expected profits through the first three months of the year.

title: Asia's trillion-dollar titans are powering — and distorting — its fastest growing stock markets
summary: Taiwan's Taiex and South Korea's Kospi indices hit record highs, yet experts warn the rally may be overly dependent on a few AI-focused semiconductor companies, raising concentration risk.
content: Taiwan's Taiex and South Korea's Kospi stock markets have been seeing record breaking rallies. The stunning surge leaves experts wondering if this growth hinges largely on a few AI-linked semiconductor giants.

title: Why joining the family business was James Reed’s hardest decision — and why it paid off
summary: James Reed, CEO of the family-owned Reed company, reflects on his pivotal decision to join the family business and the leadership lessons it taught him about risk and avoiding stagnation.
content: James Reed reflects on the decision that defined his career — taking the risk of joining the family business. The Reed CEO discusses failure, purpose and why standing still is the worst decision of all.

zh.title: 为什么加入家族企业对詹姆斯·里德来说是最艰难的决定——以及它为什么有回报
zh.summary: 家族企业里德公司首席执行官詹姆斯·里德反思了他加入家族企业的关键性决定，以及它教给他的关于风险和避免停滞的领导力课程。

title: Five things to watch in Asia as Trump prepares to meet China's Xi this week
summary: Trump and Xi are scheduled to meet in Beijing this week amid critical diplomatic talks, with multiple Asian developments expected to influence the agenda.
content: The U.S. and Chinese presidents are scheduled to gather in Beijing on Thursday and Friday amid a packed week of diplomatic meetings.

zh.title: 特朗普本周准备与中国领导人习近平会面，亚洲需要关注的五件事
zh.summary: 特朗普和习近平定于本周在北京会面进行关键外交谈判，多项亚洲动态预计将影响议程。

title: Trump puts Taiwan arms sales, Hong Kong jailed activist Lai on agenda ahead of meeting with Xi
summary: Trump has signaled that Taiwan military assistance and the imprisonment of Hong Kong media tycoon Jimmy Lai will be central topics in his Beijing summit with Xi.
content: Trump said Monday that U.S. arms sales to Taiwan and the imprisonment of Hong Kong media tycoon Jimmy Lai would be among the issues at the summit in Beijing.

title: Iren’s stock pulls back as investors assess the steep price of the AI buildout
summary: Iren's stock declined following its Nvidia partnership announcement as investors weigh the substantial capital costs of AI infrastructure expansion, though analysts suggest the market reaction may be excessive.
content: Iren will take on debt in the wake of its new Nvidia partnership. One analyst said Monday’s stock drop is an overreaction.

zh.title: 投资者评估人工智能基础设施建设的高昂成本，艾瑞股票下跌

title: Oil prices extend gains as Trump comments diminish hopes for a U.S.-Iran peace deal
summary: President Trump's comments that the Iran ceasefire is on "life support" have raised concerns about prolonged Middle East conflict, driving oil prices higher on Tuesday. The uncertainty around U.S.-Iran relations continues to impact global energy markets.
content: Oil prices rose Tuesday amid concerns over a prolonged Middle East conflict after President Trump's comments that the ceasefire with Iran is on "life support"

zh.title: 随着特朗普评论降低美国-伊朗和平协议希望，油价继续上涨

title: Asia markets rise as investors brush off Trump’s ceasefire warning
summary: Despite Trump's warnings about the fragility of the U.S.-Iran ceasefire, Asia-Pacific markets posted gains Tuesday as investors remained relatively optimistic. The region's resilience suggests confidence in economic fundamentals despite geopolitical concerns.
content: Asia-Pacific markets rise as investors shrugged off fresh doubts over the fragile U.S.-Iran ceasefire.

zh.title: 亚洲市场上升，投资者对特朗普停火警告不以为然

title: China should stop hoarding food and fertiliser, says former World Bank chief
summary: Former World Bank chief David Malpass called on China to stop stockpiling food and fertilizer, with his comments coming as Trump and Xi Jinping prepare for meetings in Beijing. The remarks highlight concerns about global supply chains and market stability amid U.S.-China tensions.
content: David Malpass' comments come as US President Donald Trump and China's Xi Jinping are due to meet in Beijing.

zh.title: 前世界银行行长表示中国应停止囤积食品和化肥
zh.summary: 前世界银行行长大卫·马尔帕斯呼吁中国停止囤积食品和肥料，他的评论恰逢特朗普和习近平准备在北京举行会议之际。这些言论突显了美中紧张局势中对全球供应链和市场稳定性的担忧。
